examples: A hipped roof has sloping sides.
I let the building be seen as one volume by employing a hip roof and laid the second floor of the housing in the hipped or inclined section.
Where the silhouette of the Virgin is an upside-down V, rooting her to earth, the slim-hipped, broad-shouldered bullfighter is an upright V, opening to the sun and sky.
Again Villa fluffed their lines when, following Howard's desperate parry from Ashley Young's swivel-hipped run and shot, Albrighton hacked the ball wildly over the bar with time and space.
